summary: Tested 5 newly integrated 'cool ideas' features on the Automotive Intelligence SaaS platform. 4 out of 5 features working perfectly. CRITICAL: /status route is blocked by infrastructure health check.

critical.issue: /status route is intercepted by infrastructure health check returning 'OK' text instead of React app
critical.root_cause: Kubernetes/Cloudflare infrastructure has a health check endpoint at /status that takes precedence over frontend routing
critical.solution: Rename the status page route from /status to /system-status or /service-status, and update the footer link accordingly

passed_tests: LiveTicker component renders on landing page between Hero and Market Features sections
LiveTicker shows animated deal cards with car info, year, location, and savings
LiveTicker has animated ping indicator showing 'Live Deals' status
LiveTicker auto-rotates deals every 4 seconds (verified: cards increased from 3 to 4 after 5 seconds)
ROI Calculator renders on landing page after Market Features section
ROI Calculator has two working sliders: 'Fahrzeuge pro Monat' (1-100) and 'Ø Fahrzeugpreis' (€5,000-€100,000)
ROI Calculator displays calculated values: Pro Fahrzeug, Pro Monat, and yearly savings
ROI Calculator shows currency formatting in German locale (€240.000)
ROI Calculator has 'Jetzt starten' CTA button linking to /demo
ECU Visualizer renders on landing page after Tuning Features section
ECU Visualizer has brand selection buttons (BMW, Audi, Mercedes, VW, Porsche)
ECU Visualizer shows model selection after brand is selected
ECU Visualizer displays ECU data (Bosch EDC17C50), TCU data (ZF 8HP), and supported tools (Autotuner, KESSv3, KTAG)
ECU Visualizer has 'Vollständige Datenbank erkunden' CTA button
Footer contains 'System Status' link in Support section pointing to /status
Demo booking page loads at /demo with 4-step wizard
Demo booking Step 1: Product type selection works (Market Intelligence, Tuning Intelligence, Both)
Demo booking Step 2: Calendar shows März 2026, weekends disabled, time slots available
Demo booking Step 3: Contact form with name, email, company, message fields
Demo booking Step 4: Confetti animation fires on successful booking with cyan, yellow-green, and white particles
Demo booking success screen shows confirmation message, date/time, and calendar download button
Navigation works for all routes: /, /market, /tuning, /login, /register, /demo, /support
failed_tests: Status Page at /status route - returns 'OK' from infrastructure health check instead of StatusPage component
action_items: CRITICAL: Rename /status route to /system-status or /service-status to avoid conflict with infrastructure health check
Update Footer.jsx to change 'System Status' link href from '/status' to the new route
Update App.js Route path from '/status' to the new route
critical_code_review_comments: LiveTicker.jsx line 30: ESLint warning about missing 'addNewDeal' dependency in useEffect - minor issue, works correctly
StatusPage route conflict with infrastructure - needs route rename
test_credentials: N/A - No authentication required for tested features
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data is MOCKED in frontend components
context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 of 5 'cool ideas' features are working: LiveTicker, ROI Calculator, ECU Visualizer, and Confetti Animation. The Status Page component exists and is correctly coded but the /status route is blocked by infrastructure health check. Main agent needs to rename the route. All navigation routes work except /status. Demo booking flow with confetti tested end-to-end successfully.
mocked_data_note: ALL data is MOCKED - no backend APIs exist. LiveTicker deals, ECU data, demo booking submission, status page services, and newsletter signup are all frontend mocks.
